overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from a desert wasteland into an industrial district. The journey passes under highway overpasses, through industrial zones with distinctive pink factories and orange gantry cranes, and ends stopped at a traffic light beneath a massive highway interchange. The scene features a mix of desert terrain, industrial architecture, and futuristic city elements under bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: driving along desert highway toward the city industrial zone, following a red vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: red car driving ahead on the same road

entered.detail: tall industrial tower with distinctive yellow and black diagonal patterning
metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines
elevated concrete highway ramp crossing the road ahead
futuristic city skyline with tall glass buildings visible in the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with sparse vegetation and a distinctive yellow-patterned industrial tower dominating the left side. The camera follows a vehicle driving toward a distant city skyline, passing power lines and approaching a highway overpass. The environment is bright and arid, with clear visibility of the urban structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete support structures

events.description: enters shadow of highway overpass, lighting dims significantly to artificial gloom
exits underpass back into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing directly under the massive concrete highway overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, transitioning from bright desert sun into shadow. The space is enclosed by thick support pillars and the overhead ramp structure. After a brief dark passage, the vehicle emerges back into sunlight, approaching an industrial zone with orange gantry structures visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial port area with shipping gantries and factory buildings

events.description: turns right into industrial zone dominated by large orange gantry cranes
passes alongside large pink industrial factory building with white storage tanks

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial area, passing large cargo gantries and factory buildings while following traffic

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near the pink factory building

entered.detail: large orange portal crane structure spanning the industrial yard
massive industrial building with distinctive pink metal siding and rusted roof
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and vertical signage
large cylindrical white storage tanks with blue horizontal stripes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a bustling industrial port area characterized by massive orange gantry cranes and a striking pink factory building. The camera passes the factory with its white storage tanks while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle navigates through this mixed industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with petrochemical facilities and mountain backdrop

events.description: black smoke becomes visible rising from industrial smokestack in the distance
makes sharp left turn at intersection marked with E. Boundary street sign

agents.ego_description: driving past industrial tanks and smokestacks with mountains visible in the background, then turning left at intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan passing by on the left side of the road

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting thick black smoke
large brown cylindrical tanks with rust and industrial piping
arid brown mountains visible in the background beyond the industrial zone
metal security fencing running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the industrial district, passing rusted storage tanks and a smokestack belching black smoke against a mountain backdrop. After driving alongside the pink factory, the vehicle makes a sharp left turn at an intersection, passing a white car and heading toward a massive highway interchange structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange underpass with traffic control

events.description: approaches red traffic light and comes to a complete stop under the highway
traffic light changes to green and vehicle begins to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light beneath the highway interchange, then proceeds on green

notable_agents.action: person standing on sidewalk near the traffic light waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive multi-level concrete highway interchange with multiple ramps
large electronic advertising screen displaying colorful graphics
traffic signal showing red then changing to green
large gray industrial building with loading docks

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and drives beneath a massive multi-level highway interchange, entering a shadowed area under the concrete ramps. The camera stops at a red traffic light, waiting beneath the highway structure with digital billboards visible. After the light changes to green, the vehicle begins to proceed through the intersection, surrounded by industrial warehouses and construction materials.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, arid desert highway into the shadowed depths of a dense industrial district. It begins by trailing a vehicle past a yellow-patterned industrial tower and power lines toward a distant skyline, before passing beneath a massive concrete overpass that momentarily plunges the scene into shadow. As the vehicle emerges back into the sunlight, the environment shifts into a bustling port area defined by towering orange gantry cranes and a striking pink factory building with white storage tanks. The camera then navigates past rusted tanks and a smoking smokestack against a mountain backdrop before making a sharp left turn toward a colossal highway interchange. Finally, the vehicle glides into the shade of the multi-level ramps and comes to a halt at a red traffic light beneath digital billboards, eventually proceeding forward through a landscape of warehouses and construction materials.
